case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 260 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 13-10-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. On 18-03-2025, Counsel for the Petitioners was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition, in view of the judgment reported as 2025 SCMR 322. Thereafter no one has turned up to pursue this petition diligently or to address the question of maintainability involved in this Petition, which prima facie suggests that the Petitioners and their Counsel have lost their interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
